name: Monster Pack (FT. Agetha. Nameless. Fen)
description:
Lmao. Why is Agetha so short in this image.

Anywho, you probably get the gist and if you don't.

It's better to have a Monster Persona ready for this.

Otherwise, prepare for Agetha, Fen, and Nameless to hate your guts if you're a human.

Set in the Snowy Forest.

Trigger Warning: Gore.

Image Credit (though not sure if it's the artist): https://www.reddit.com/r/FundamentalPaperEdu/comments/1j02mbk/if_you_were_a_mutant_like_fen_and_nameless/
creator: Plagie
